TestDescription: This API will create an Agency Affiliation Record for a student in Contact Manager - NOTE!: The Staff member must be part of the staff group found in RequestId: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003

Apis.RequestUrl: /ds/campusnexus/StudentPreviousEducation?$select=Id,GraduationDate,AtbDate,Gpa,HighSchoolId,HsGradYear,CollegeId,OtherCollege&$expand=Degree($select=Id,Name),HighSchool($select=Id,Name,Code,Country,State,City;$expand=HighSchoolCountry($select=Name)),College($select=Id,Name,Code,State,City;$expand=Country($select=Name)),PreviousEducation($select=Type)&$format=json&$count=true&$filter=StudentId eq {{gStudentId}} and (AtbCode ne null or CollegeId ne null or HighSchoolId ne null or HsGradYear ne null)
